name: tuition-management
description: Cross-platform tuition management app — React PWA + Node/Express + MongoDB

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run icons --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.test: npm test --prefix server && npm test --prefix client
scripts.install:all: npm i --prefix server && npm i --prefix client
